docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, SYLVESTER (APPELLANT) AS TO DEFENDANT CAL STATE PATROL SERVICE INC. A CORP. (RESPONDENT) STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, SYLVESTER (APPELLANT) ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
PLAINTIFF, APPELLANT, SYLVESTER BAILEY IS IN FORMA PERSONA,
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-31-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606

JUDGE:VISITING JUDGE JOHN ZYLKA/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:DIANA PADILLA 9:00AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PRESENT: PLFF SYLVESTER BAILEY IN PRO PER, AND DEFT CAL STATE PATROL SERVICE INC, A CORP, ALSO APPEARING PRO PER (WITH CARRIE JACKSON, VICE PRESIDENT OF THE CORPORATION, APPEARING, REPRESENTING THE CORP) PLFF TESTIFIED W/ DOCUMENTS PRESENTED TO COURT (NOT MARKED FOR ID). DEFT,APPEARING THRU CARRIE JACKSON, VICE PRESIDENT OF THE CORPORATION AND RONALD SPRY, MGR OF CAL STATE PATROL SERVICE, TESTIFIED. CASE SUBMITTED.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CAL STATE PATROL SERVICE INC. A CORP. (RESPONDENT) SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITONS.
